'''chongawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivyleaf|ivyleaf]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivyleaf|ivyleaf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chongawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || chongawithi || chongawiji || chongawishi || chongawiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || chongawuthu || chongawuju || chongawushu || chongawuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || chongawuthu || chongawuju || chongawushu || chongawuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || chongawufthuf || chongawufjuf || chongawufshuf || chongawufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || chongawethe || chongaweje || chongaweshe || chongaweke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || chongawotho || chongawojo || chongawosho || chongawoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || chongawotho || chongawojo || chongawosho || chongawoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || chongawofthof || chongawofjof || chongawofshof || chongawofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || chongawïfthïf || chongawïfjïf || chongawïfshïf || chongawïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || chongawïfthïf || chongawïfjïf || chongawïfshïf || chongawïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || chongawïfthïf || chongawïfjïf || chongawïfshïf || chongawïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || chongawïfthïf || chongawïfjïf || chongawïfshïf || chongawïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || chongawæthæ || chongawæjæ || chongawæshæ || chongawækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || chongawatha || chongawaja || chongawasha || chongawaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || chongawatha || chongawaja || chongawasha || chongawaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || chongawafthaf || chongawafjaf || chongawafshaf || chongawafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || chongawasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || chongawshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || chongawroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || chongawmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || chongawyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gochongawnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gochongawnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gochongawnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gochongawnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || chongangawasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || chongangawshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || chongangawroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || chongangawmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || chongangawyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gochongangawnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gochongangawnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gochongangawnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gochongangawnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || chengæwasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || chengæwshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || chengæwroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || chengæwmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || chengæwyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gochengæwnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gochengæwnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gochengæwnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gochengæwnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || chongfawasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || chongfawshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || chongfawroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || chongfawmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || chongfawyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gochongfawnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gochongfawnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gochongfawnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gochongfawnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
